rejection_reason: tone: forbidden_phrase_start — follow-up email opens with 'Just following up', which adds no new value and signals the sender has nothing new to say. Follow-ups must open with a new signal, insight, or reason to reconnect.
text:
Subject: Re: FlowAI for {{company}}

Hey {{first_name}},

Just following up on my last email about FlowAI. I wanted to make sure you had a chance to read it.

As I mentioned, FlowAI saves an average of 2 hours per day and integrates with 50+ popular tools.

Let me know if you'd like to hop on a call.
